title: Command Dumper
description: Allows you to save all commands that the server sends to you (as tab completable when you type "/" in chat)
body:
# Command Dumper

Allows you to save all commands that the server sends to you (as tab completable when you type "/" in chat).

Commands are taken from the available completions in chat, no actual commands are sent to the server, after which they are sorted alphabetically before being saved.

Saved commands go to `.minecraft/dumpedcommands/<server ip>.txt`.

There's no configuration screen.
